text: | `chat_write.rs:99-103` "must name a concrete session codename" bail | Drop the `target_session` requirement. Route by `target.pubkey` alone — delivery (line 176) already keys on `mentioned_pubkey`. | [...] 1. **`chat_write.rs:99-103`** — the bail itself. With codenames gone there is no "concrete session" to demand; must route by pubkey. **Fix:** delete the requirement (delivery already pubkey-keyed).
